headline: M&T Bank Corporation Announces Second Quarter Dividends
summary: M&T Bank Corporation ("M&T") (NYSE:MTB) announced that it has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.50 per share on its common stock. The dividend will be payable June 30, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business on June 1, 2026.

headline: M&T Bank Corporation (MTB) Could Be a Great Choice
summary: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does M&T Bank (MTB) have what it takes? Let's find out.

headline: BOK Financial Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates as NII & Fee Income Rise Y/Y
summary: BOKF beats Q1 estimates as NII and fee income climb, boosting profits and margins, though higher expenses and declining deposits weigh on performance.

headline: Zions Q1 Earnings Beat on Higher NII & Fee Income, Provision Benefit
summary: ZION tops Q1 EPS estimates on strong NII and fee income, with improving credit quality and margins, though rising expenses and revenue miss temper the outlook.

raw.headline: Zions Q1 Earnings Beat on Higher NII & Fee Income, Provision Benefit

headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Cuts M&T Bank Corporation (MTB) Price Target, Sees Strong Growth Drivers Intact
summary: M&T Bank Corporation (NYSE:MTB) is included among the 12 High Dividend Stocks Picked by Billionaire Ray Dalio. On April 17, Cantor Fitzgerald analyst Dave Rochester lowered the firm’s price recommendation on M&T Bank Corporation (NYSE:MTB) to $253 from $255. It reiterated an Overweight rating on the shares.
